ingredients_text: Cooked brown rice (45%) (water, brown rice), vegetables (24%) (garden peas, tomato, courgette, aubergine, pepper (red & green), onion), Chinese inspired sauce (16%) (water, vegan stock (yeast extracts, dried glucose syrup, salt, rapeseed oil, onion powder, tomato powder, carrot powder), onion, cornflour, garlic puree, ginger puree, yeast extract (yeast extract, sweet potato maltodextrin), bay leaf powder, ground white pepper), vegan chicken-style pieces (15%) (water, pea protein, vegetable oils (rapeseed, sunflower), yeast extract, salt, sugar, spices, natural flavouring, dried vegetables (potato, onion, leek), lemon juice concentrate, smoked salt, herbs, herb and spice extracts).
